---
title: "Python Reference"
---

The `unifres` Python package implements the unifying functional residual methodology for generalized linear models.

See the navigation bar or the links below for the core functions and utilities:

### Core Functions
* [`fresiduals`](fresiduals.qmd)
* [`fredplot`](fredplot.qmd)
* [`ffplot`](ffplot.qmd)

### Utilities
* [`is_fitted`](utils.is_fitted.qmd)
* [`unifend`](utils.unifend.qmd)
* [`expand_endpoints`](utils.expand_endpoints.qmd)
